# AsyncThrowingPublisher.Iterator

**Structure**

The iterator that produces elements of the asynchronous publisher sequence.

## Declaration

```swift
struct Iterator
```

## Iterating over elements

- **next()**: Produces the next element in the prefix sequence.

## Creating an iterator

- **makeAsyncIterator()**: Creates the asynchronous iterator that produces elements of this asynchronous sequence.

## Conforms To

- AsyncIteratorProtocol

items.description: Produces the next element in the prefix sequence.
items.name: next()

items.description: Creates the asynchronous iterator that produces elements of this asynchronous sequence.
items.name: makeAsyncIterator()
